subtopics.title: Components of Physical Fitness
subtopics.teaching_note: Physical fitness: ability to perform daily activities without getting tired. Components: Strength (muscle power), Endurance (ability to continue activity), Flexibility (range of motion at joints), Speed (moving quickly), Agility (changing direction quickly), Balance (maintaining position), Coordination (using body parts together). Benefits: healthy heart, strong muscles, better concentration, weight control, stress relief. Activities: running, jumping, stretching, sports. Nigerian sports: football (very popular), athletics, basketball, volleyball.
